field.label: WAN Interface
field.help: Select the WAN interface where DPI bypass should be applied.

field.label: Mode
field.help: dvtws2 uses divert sockets (recommended). tpws2 uses transparent proxy.

field.label: Divert Port
field.help: Internal port for ipfw divert socket (default: 989). Change only if conflicting with another service.

field.label: Desync Mode
field.help:
DPI evasion strategy. Use Diagnostics > Blockcheck to find the best mode for your ISP.
fake — send fake TLS ClientHello with low TTL (most common)
multisplit — split TLS ClientHello across TCP segments
fakedsplit — combine fake + split
fakeddisorder — fake + out-of-order segments
syndata — add data to SYN packet
hopbyhop — add hop-by-hop IPv6 header
destopt — add destination options header
ipfrag1 — IP fragmentation

field.label: Desync TTL
field.help: Time-to-live for fake packets. Must be high enough to reach the DPI device but low enough to expire before reaching the server. Typical values: 4-8. Use blockcheck to determine optimal value.

field.label: Desync Fooling
field.help: Additional method to make fake packets rejected by the server but accepted by DPI. badsum = bad TCP checksum, badseq = bad sequence number, md5sig = TCP MD5 signature.

field.label: Split Position
field.help: Byte position at which to split TLS ClientHello. Relevant for multisplit, fakedsplit, and fakeddisorder modes.

field.label: Ports
field.help: Comma-separated list of ports to intercept (default: 80,443).

field.label: Custom Arguments
field.help: Additional command-line arguments passed directly to dvtws2/tpws2. Use for advanced configurations not covered by the fields above.

field.label: Host List Mode
field.help:
All traffic — apply DPI bypass to all traffic on configured ports.
Only listed domains — apply only to domains listed below.

field.label: Domains
field.help: One domain per line. Only used when Host List Mode is set to "Only listed domains".
